title: APDC 2026 TIMETABLE · JUDGE PROGRAM
summary: Formation → Quarter Final (only events containing the four priority competitors are pulled forward) → Semi Final → Amateur Rising Star → Opening Ceremony & Judges Introduction → Country Team Match → Finals → Senior → Mania → Pro-Am → Amateur Solo → Under 18 Elite A → Amateur Couple. Operational timing applied from 12:00; projected finish 19:12:10 without a separate break.

rules.priority: Only events containing GaEun LEE, SaRang KIM, ChaeEun PARK, or JuEun BYEON are pulled forward within the Quarter Final block. Other Under 12 events are not automatically prioritized.
rules.smallEventGrouping: Only source events with 3 entries or fewer may be combined. Solo with Solo and Couple with Couple; different ages allowed only when style and dance combination match. Judging and results remain separate.
rules.mania: Mania events run progressively R → C → S. R-only exits after R; CR exits after C; CRS continues through S. Results remain separate.
rules.operatingTime: Timing basis: 1:10 music + 0:10 MC per dance + 0:05 entrance per run. Formation 10 min, Opening/Judges 10 min, Team Match 15 min. No separate break inserted.
